metadata.title:
SPOKANE TOTAL


OVER $4,000

SUPERINTENDENT WITTEN'S
OFFICIAL REPORT OF NUM-
Der OF REGISTRATIONS FOR
LAND YESTERDAY AND TO
DATE,

pages.raw_text:
Applications for registration for
Occur d'Alene, Flathead and Spo,
kane lands have been officially re
ceived by James Witten, superin-
tendent, yesterday as follows:


Number received from Occur
d'Alene, 4,579; total received from
Occur d'Alene to date, 34,56O;
number received from Kalispell,
693: total received from Kalispell
to date, 1885, number received
from Missoula. 7,1S6; total received
from Missoula to date, 1887;
total received for Flathead lands
to date, 23,423; total received from
Spokane to date, $685. number
received from Spokane yesterday
a 400.
